# Auto-generated TWISTER offline Pong model-size and spatial-regularization jobs for tiny-exp-scheduler.
#
# Run from the TWISTER repository root with conda env twister.
# Dataset path: /data/luyukuan/projects/oc-storm/datasets/converted_from_diamond/pong/train
# Model sizes: ['base']
# WM initial source: real
# Mask presets: ['mask1']
# Spatial weights: [0.001, 0.005, 0.05]
# Train steps: 100000
# Batch size: 16
# Batch length: 64
# Torch CPU threads per job: 8
# Log every: 10
# W&B enabled: 1
# W&B project: twister
# Total jobs: 3
#
# Usage:
#   tiny-exp-scheduler run scripts/experiments/pong_offline_regu_ac_cpc_fine_w001_005_05.commands.txt --cuda-devices auto --logs-dir runs/pong_offline_regu_ac_cpc_fine_sweep/scheduler_logs --verbose --keep-job-tabs

bash -lc 'cd /scorpio/home/luyukuan/projects/twister && OMP_NUM_THREADS=8 MKL_NUM_THREADS=8 OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=8 NUMEXPR_NUM_THREADS=8 TWISTER_TORCH_NUM_THREADS=8 conda run --no-capture-output -n twister python -u train_offline.py --dataset-path /data/luyukuan/projects/oc-storm/datasets/converted_from_diamond/pong/train --run-root runs/pong_offline_regu_ac_cpc_fine_sweep/logdir --run-name twister_pong_offline_ac_cpc_static_diamond_model=base_mask1_spatial_0p001 --model-size base --wm-initial-source real --spatial-regu-weight 0.001 --mask-preset mask1 --train-steps 100000 --batch-size 16 --batch-length 64 --torch-num-threads 8 --log-every 10 --wandb-enabled 1 --wandb-project twister --wandb-mode online --wandb-entity ssl-lab'
